creator: kennethsalerno@yahoo.com
text:
(In reply to Jan Beich (mail not working) from comment #6)
I don't know, Jan, call me conservative but news like this persuades me to be cautious to jump on the latest release of any software: https://goo.gl/Ei3Hq3

In my experience, it is less frustrating to use N-1 major releases for everything but development or must-have features or functions.
